data.name: Pretty Girls and Dark Witch. A simple story
data.detailed_description:
FIND HMUR!


關於此遊戲

Pretty Girls and Dark Witch is a relaxing puzzle game with elements of visual novel and bright anime-style heroines.

Solve puzzles, collect images, and unlock a full CG gallery. Between levels, enjoy short comic scenes that reveal each girl's personality and story. Some stages include boss fights that require quick thinking.

🎮 Features:

- 🧩 Over 20 puzzle levels

- 👧 5 unique magical girls

- 🖼️ CG illustrations unlocked as you play

- 📖 Comic-style story scenes

- 🏆 Steam achievements

- ⚔️ Boss battles and fast-paced challenges

From calm puzzles to tense encounters — the game blends relaxing flow with anime-styled action moments.

Pretty Girls and Dark Witch is a relaxing puzzle game with elements of visual novel and bright anime-style heroines.

Solve puzzles, collect images, and unlock a full CG gallery. Between levels, enjoy short comic scenes that reveal each girl's personality and story. Some stages include boss fights that require quick thinking.

data.short_description: A relaxing puzzle game with anime girls, comic-style scenes, and revealing CG illustrations. Over 20 levels and five charming heroines await you.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP
  • 處理器: Intel atom Z3xx (Silvermont)
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics Series. 1280x720 or better required
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Sound Devices compartible Direct Sound
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64bit ver)
  • 處理器: Core i5 of Ivy Bridge generation or better or AMD Ryzen 5
  • 記憶體: 2096 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD or Nvidia (VRAM 1GB or better). Recommended 1920x1080
  • 儲存空間: 250 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6+
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Open GL compatible
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux x86/x86_64
  • 處理器: Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Open GL compatible
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
